_comment: Golden vectors pinning the HMAC signing contract from src/local_writer/publisher.py. The secret is a FAKE test value (never a real key). The PHP plugin MUST reproduce signature from (secret,timestamp,nonce,body); the Python test (tests/test_wp_plugin_contract.py) asserts publisher.sign does too, so the two languages stay byte-compatible.
body:
{"content": "

Drain Cleaning in Austin

\n

We offer fast drain cleaning. Call us!

", "focus_keyword": "drain cleaning austin", "jsonld": {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Article", "articleSection": "service", "headline": "Drain Cleaning Austin", "keywords": "drain cleaning austin"}, "page_type": "service", "status": "draft", "title": "Drain Cleaning Austin"}
_read_routes_comment: h-wp-site-inventory-and-audit: the READ routes (inventory/page) ride the SAME canonical-string signing; bodies are the Python client's json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True) bytes.
